text.title: AI-Generated IaC Review Gate Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-generated-iac-review-gate applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the IaC change AI-assisted AND targets production blast radius?

example.description: When `yes AND blast_radius=high` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r3` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
